title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Aster DM Healthcare Capital India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Aster DM Healthcare Capital India
jsonLd.description:
We at Aster DM Healthcare Capital India are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Bhubaneswar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Aster DM Healthcare Capital India:
Aster DM Healthcare Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aster DM Healthcare Capital India!
